command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, sys
cmd = ['bun', 'test', 'src/telemetry/store.test.ts']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd)
duration_ms = int((time.time() - start) * 1000)
print(f'__EXIT_CODE__={proc.returncode}')
print(f'__DURATION_MS__={duration_ms}')
sys.exit(proc.returncode)
PY
